name: Clear candle business
input: I sell handmade candles in Melbourne. My customers are people buying gifts or home decoration. Everything is handmade by me. I want the website to feel warm and friendly.

name: Missing business name
input: I do mobile car washing around Sydney. I help busy car owners who do not have time to clean their cars. I want a modern website.

name: Messy natural speech
input: Um yeah so basically I do like cleaning, mostly houses, sometimes small offices, around Melbourne, and I guess people book me because I’m flexible and cheaper than big companies.
